description.from: Launches an attack that bounces 4 times starting from the nearest enemy, dealing 460*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 292% of ATK M.DMG to each enemy hit. DMG increases by up to 100% the farther the enemy is. This attack is treated as a Normal Attack.
description.to: Deals ??? M.DMG by shooting a bouncing projectile which bounces 3 times starting from the nearest enemy. The further the enemy, the more DMG inflicted.

description.from: Deals 508*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 321.8% of ATK M.DMG 2 time(s) to a random enemy and nearby enemies, and stuns them for 1sec. DMG increases by up to 200% the farther the enemy is.
description.to: Deals ??? M.DMG to enemies furthest away in a small range, and stuns them for 3 sec. The further the enemy, the more DMG they will take.

description.from: Deals 132*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 84% of ATK M.DMG 6 time(s) to enemies within range, knocks them back for 1.5sec, and reduces Crit Chance by 60% for 4sec. DMG increases by up to 150% the farther the enemy is.
description.to: Deals ??? M.DMG to target enemies in range, and reduces target's Crit Chance by 100% for 7 sec.

description.from: Attacks the farthest enemy, dealing 440*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 278.6% of ATK M.DMG, knocking them back for 1sec, and increasing M.DMG taken by 20% for 6sec. DMG increases by up to 200% the farther the enemy is.
description.to: When inflicted by CC, dispels negative effects from self and attacks the farthest enemy, dealing ??? M.DMG and knocking it away for 2 sec.

light.to: Gains immunity to CC for the duration of Skill.

dark.to: Enemies hit are stunned for 2 sec.

light.from: Mana cost is increased by 2000, but the number of hits is increased by 2.
light.to: In exchange for 2 additional Mana Cost, attacks random enemies 3 times.

dark.from: Mana cost is increased by 1000, but targets the farthest enemy.

light.to: Reduces ACC of hit enemies by 150 for 7 sec.

dark.from: Reduces ACC of hit enemies by 500 for 4 sec.
dark.to: In exchange for 1 additional Mana Cost, knock back the enemy over a long distance.

description.from: [Pew!] Increases DMG by {0}%, and upon Critical Hit, recovers Mana by 200.
description.to: [Pew!] Increases DMG by 20%, and upon Critical Hit, recovers Mana by {0}.

description.from: [Twinkle Twinkle] Reduces M.Crit Resist by {0}, and this reduction becomes irremovable.
description.to: [Twinkle Twinkle] Crit Chance Reduction will not be dispelled, and the effect duration will increase by {0} sec.

description.from: [Gotcha!] reduces Cooldown by {0} sec and cleanses self when affected by a CC once every 20 sec.
description.to: [Gotcha!] Greatly increases the knockback range, and Cooldown is reduced by {0} sec.

dark.from: Damage dealt to non-hero enemies is increased by 15%, and damage taken is reduced by 15%.
dark.to: Grants Blessing of the Carrot. Blessing of the Carrot increases DMG dealt to Non-Hero enemies by 30%, and reduces DMG received by 30%.

description.from: Critical Damage is increased by {0}%, Normal Attack damage by {1}%, and Attack Range by {2}%.
description.to: Increases Crit DMG by {0}%, DMG of normal attacks by {1}% and the Range by {2}%.

description.from: Summons the Soul of Flower of Eternity, Hyacinth, dealing 100% of ATK M.DMG to nearby enemies, freezing them for 5sec and knocking them back. Afterward, deals 600% of ATK M.DMG to frozen enemies and increases own Crit DMG by 100% for 10sec.
description.to: Summons the Soul of Flower of Eternity, Hyacinth, dealing ??? M.DMG to nearby enemies within a circular range of self, freezing them for 5 sec and knocking them back far away. Afterward,the Soul of Hyacinth deals ??? additional M.DMG to frozen enemies and increases own Crit DMG by 100% for 10 sec.

1.from: For the duration, increases Normal Attack range by 20%.
1.to: Hit targets take increased M.DMG by 40% for 10 sec.

2.from: For the duration, increases NFor the duration, Normal Attacks hit 2 targets and knock them back for 1 sec.ormal Attack range by 2%.
2.to: For the duration of Skill, increases the number of targets that Normal Attacks hit by 3. The range of Normal Attacks increases by 30%, knocking back the hit target.
